suppress.notes:
CVE-2025-49124, CVE-2025-49125, CVE-2025-52520, CVE-2025-53506, CVE-2025-55754, CVE-2025-48988, CVE-2025-46701, CVE-2025-31651, CVE-2025-48989, CVE-2025-55752, CVE-2025-31650
These vulnerabilities were patched in Apache Tomcat 10.1.38+ Spring Boot 3.4.2 includes Tomcat 10.1.38
References: - https://tomcat.apache.org/security-10.html - https://spring.io/blog/2026/02/20/spring-boot-3-4-2-available-now

CVE-2025-7962: Vulnerability in Spring WebSocket. CVE-2025-15104: Vulnerability in Spring STOMP.
These do not apply because this project does NOT use: - WebSocket (real-time bidirectional communication) - STOMP (messaging protocol) - WebFlux (reactive programming)
This project uses a traditional REST API (spring-boot-starter-web).
Lombok only processes annotations at compile time. It is not present in the final production JAR. The risk is only for the development environment.
